subcodes.title: Words to George Winterburn et al, spoken on 1904-02-09
subcodes.first_line: Every nation is looking for a Promised One, or indeed, for two Manifestations. Zoroastrians expect two. The Jews expect Elias and Christ.
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @outward and inward meanings, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @symbolism, @suffering; rejection of Christ
